summary: Tested all 8 UI improvement features: quest.text in receipt, goal grouping in CommandCenter, counter badge, quest selection, reset sprint, tracking mode task cards, and Launch Mission flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 UI improvements verified working: (1) SelectedTasksReceipt shows quest.text (e.g. '45-minute physical training') grouped under dim uppercase goal name labels with green left border. (2) CommandCenter GoalGroup shows goal name as bold header with EP badge, quests listed below indented with quest.text only. (3) TrackingMode TaskCard shows goal.name as small dim uppercase label on top and quest.text as bold white text below. Reset Sprint clears selections correctly. Mobile responsive layout uses stacked column via sm:flex-row breakpoint.
